column3: LaCrosse Alphaburly Pro 18" Insulated Hunting Boots for Men Featuring Waterproof Rubber, 1600G Thinsulate, and EVA Footbed, First Lite Cipher
column23: LaCrosse epitomizes a legacy deeply rooted in purpose. Alphaburly Pro elevates your hunt with a perfect blend of rugged performance and comfortable wear. Built with a time-tested tradition of quality, these premium boots combine hand-laid, scent-free rubber with naturally insulating neoprene for unmatched flexibility, waterproof protection, and long-lasting durability. Whether you're battling the cold rain or trekking through snow, 1600G Thinsulate Ultra insulation keeps your feet warm without adding unwanted bulk. The moisture-wicking jersey knit liner further enhances comfort by pulling sweat away from your skin, ensuring dry feet throughout your adventure. An adjustable rear gusset provides a customized fit for a variety of calf sizes and allows for easy on and off. Conquer challenging landscapes with confidence thanks to the Burly Pro outsole. This innovative tread pattern provides superior traction on mud, snow, and loose ground, while the chamfered edges effectively shed muck to keep you light on your feet. From navigating uneven terrain to enduring harsh elements, the LaCrosse Alphaburly Pro keeps you focused on the hunt. A time will come when you are faced with a challenge. You could spend your energy finding a way to quietly walk away from it, or face it head on, give it every inch of your being, succeed and walk away proud. Dominate your ground.

column3: ROCKY Men's Sport Pro Insulated Hunting Boots
column23: The Rocky sport pro side-zip 1200 gram waterproof rubber boot in Realtree edge camo is a great addition to a tradition of quality hunting boots. Built with features like an aggressive multi-directional outsole, vulcanized rubber foot with added protection over Key wear areas, and a 5mm neoprene shaft and you can see why you'll feel like a pro wearing them. Add to this an open cell pu foam footbed, an expansion fit calf for a more universal fit calf, and of course the benefit of scent concealment, and you've got a true sportsman's boot. Top it all off with the ultimate late season comfort of 1200 grams of insulation and an easy on -and -off side zipper and you've got a rubber boot like no other. Hunting is your sport, take it on Like a pro with the new Rocky sport pro side-zip 1200 gram waterproof rubber boot.
